meta.poznamky: sketch_code používá PenDown/PenUp protože zpátka nesmí kreslit

cms.task_text: Seřaďte bloky: nakreslete [hlp]čáru 90px a vraťte želvičku zpět[/hlp] bez stopy.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="1" x="200" y="30"></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="2" x="40" y="200"><field name="DISTANCE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="3" x="260" y="180"></block><block type="turtle_backward" id="4" x="80" y="290"><field name="DISTANCE">90</field></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="1" x="50" y="50"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="2"><field name="DISTANCE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="3"><next><block type="turtle_backward" id="4"><field name="DISTANCE">90</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>

testing_js.poznamka: Paste do testing.js pro lokální otestování v sandboxu
